mnemonics.title: Five Levels of Virtualization
mnemonics.content: I Have Olive-Leaf Arrangements: ISA, HAL, OS, Library, Application - ordered from lowest (hardware) to highest (application) abstraction level.

mnemonics.title: Performance vs Flexibility
mnemonics.content: ISA = slowest but most flexible (any ISA on any ISA). OS-level = fastest (containers share kernel). Think: lower level = more overhead, higher level = more portable.
